author: aruneshsarker
description: SOTA (10L Int5MLP MuonWD0.04 SWA50) + Test-Time Training with LoRA adapters (rank-8, lr=0.01, chunk=256)
changes: Added TTT LoRA eval: per-document LoRA adaptation at eval time (no retraining needed)
BatchedLinearLoRA: batched per-document Q/V/lm_head LoRA adapters (rank=8)
eval_val_ttt_lora: chunk-based document eval with Adam TTT updates before each chunk
TTT hyperparams: ttt_lora_rank=8, ttt_lora_lr=0.01, ttt_chunk_size=256, ttt_batch_size=64
